title: RoFAlien
description: A redstone display texture pack from LAS.
body:
This is a redstone display texture pack.  
This texture pack is under dev and has few features at the moment

## Features
- Hopper enable display;
- Piston&sticky piston working&facing display;
- Observer working&facing display;
- Dropper facing display;
- Dispenser facing display;
- Redstone power display;
- Note block enable display;
- Repeater power display;
- And more!
## Schedule(0.0.2)
#|Object|Completion
-|-|-
#1|Issue #1|✅
#2|Retexture Dispenser&Dropper|✅
#3|Add Redstone lamp texture|⏸️
#4|Add Composter texture|✅
#5|Add Target texture|✅
#6|Add Cauldron texture|✅
#7|Add Pressure plate texture|✅
#8|Add Buttom texture|⏸️

## Suggestions
If u want to provide suggestions for the project, u can:
- Take a [issue](https://github.com/LazyAlienServer/Re-LASMinecraftTexture/issues) or [discussion](https://github.com/LazyAlienServer/Re-LASMinecraftTexture/discussions).

# 简体中文
此资源包目前正在开发中，功能较少。
## 功能列表
- 漏斗激活显示；
- 活塞与粘性活塞显示；
- 侦测器显示；
- 投掷器显示；
- 发射器显示；
- 红石信号显示；
- 音符盒激活显示；
- 中继器挡位及激活显示

## 建议
如果你想为此项目提出建议，你可以：
- 前往 [Github Issue](https://github.com/LazyAlienServer/Re-LASMinecraftTexture/issues) 或 [Github Discussion](https://github.com/LazyAlienServer/Re-LASMinecraftTexture/discussions).
